positive: A retro synthwave illustration depicting a lone palm tree silhouette against a neon gradient sunset over a grid-patterned ocean. Include stylized 80s geometric shapes and vaporwave aesthetics. Bold lines, vibrant magenta and cyan color scheme, outrun album art style.
